summary: P0 Features Testing Complete: Trade Override Toggle and Effective Start Date filtering verified. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI verified - Manager Traded column with toggle switches appears when Master Admin simulates a specific licensee.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed AuthContext.jsx to include licenseId and effective_start_date in simulatedView - these fields were being passed from Sidebar but dropped in simulateMemberView function
Trade Override endpoints (/api/admin/licenses/{id}/trade-overrides) working correctly - GET, POST, DELETE all functional
masterTraded variable correctly checks tradeOverrides first, then falls back to masterAdminTrades (line 2847 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx)
generateDailyProjectionForMonth correctly filters days before effectiveStartDate (lines 174-187)
Manager Traded column with toggle switches appears when Master Admin simulates a specific licensee with licenseId

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Manager Traded column and toggle switches verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing licensee data (Ryan TEST with effective_start_date 2025-01-15)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Features verified: 1) Trade Override Toggle - /api/admin/licenses/{id}/trade-overrides endpoints work (GET, POST, DELETE); 2) Manager Traded column with toggle switches appears in Daily Projection when Master Admin simulates a specific licensee; 3) masterTraded checks tradeOverrides first, then masterAdminTrades; 4) effectiveStartDate filtering works in generateDailyProjectionForMonth; 5) Fixed AuthContext.jsx to pass licenseId and effective_start_date in simulatedView.

trade_override_api.details: GET /api/admin/licenses/{id}/trade-overrides returns overrides dict keyed by date. POST creates/updates overrides. DELETE removes overrides. Invalid date format returns 400. Non-existent license returns 404.

trade_override_ui.details: Manager Traded column with toggle switches appears in Daily Projection dialog when Master Admin simulates a specific licensee. Toggle switches have data-testid='trade-toggle-{date}' format.

effective_start_date_filtering.details: License with effective_start_date 2025-01-15 found (618db632). generateDailyProjectionForMonth filters days before effectiveStartDate.

auth_context_fix.details: Fixed simulateMemberView in AuthContext.jsx to include licenseId and effective_start_date fields. These are now properly passed when simulating a specific licensee.
